data.name: Hentai Octoq Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
Delicious puzzle game, you just need to swap the pieces to restore the images. You will get a busy hand on your MOUSE to play and the other hand free to have fun and relax. Be a taster of delightful high-class girls and refinement.

  • The game and the gallery can be operated with one hand.
  • Discover the most intimate secrets of these exciting girls in the gallery.
  • Beautiful girls that will make you excited.
  • You will be horny and you will feel very happy.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP SP2+
  • 處理器: Intel Core Duo or faster
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: optional
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 50 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 10, 8, 7, Vista
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or faster
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce 6100, Intel X3000 or Radeon X1300
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 50 MB 可用空間
